name: building-blocks
description: Building Blocks are FLAC3D-only structured 3D mesh objects used to build, refine, group, and export 3D block meshes before zone generation.
compatibility_notes: Use sketch-workflow for FLAC2D zone generation.
Sketch can send fully structured FLAC3D sketches to Building Blocks.
validation_notes: Check block quality and grouping before zone generation.
Use structured meshes where local refinement or hexahedral control matters.
Do not expose this workflow for FLAC2D product-filtered sessions.
